assumptions: Task description was provided and only used as a low-risk planning hint.
Spec text was provided and only used where it did not contradict the contract.

expected_properties: Observable outputs respond to legal input changes without assuming internal state.
Checks focus on input/output consistency rather than cycle-accurate timing.
S equals A plus B modulo 2^32
C32 equals carry out of addition
cases.goal: Exercise representative legal input combinations and observe output mapping with explicit property checks.
notes: Case intent is conservative when the contract is weak or timing is unresolved.
Added explicit property verification for sum and carry.
Preserve ambiguity where timing is unknown.
preconditions: Use only ports and observable signals present in the contract.
cases.settle_requirement: Observe after inputs settle (no specific cycle count).
stimulus_intent: Drive a representative legal input pattern across known non-control inputs: ['A', 'B']
Drive random legal values to A and B, then record S and C32.
timing_assumptions: Do not infer internal state or undocumented storage.

expected_properties: S equals A+B modulo 2^32 for extreme vectors
C32 reflects correct carry for extreme vectors
cases.goal: Validate adder behavior on all-zero and all-one inputs (boundary conditions).
stimulus_intent: Apply all-zero vector then all-one vector to inputs A and B and observe outputs.

expected_properties: Each successive output matches sum of corresponding inputs.
cases.goal: Check adder response to rapid successive input changes without intermediate idle cycles.
stimulus_intent: Drive two distinct input vectors back-to-back and record outputs for each.

unresolved_items: Contract strength is limited; generated cases favor safe observation over precise timing assumptions.
